title: Reading List
content:
Reading List

The Wisdom of Crowds - James Surowiecki
Large groups of people are smarter than an elite few—no matter how brilliant.

Amusing Ourselves to Death - Neil Postman
Writing on the Wall: Social Media, the first 2000 years

Who Owns the Future? - Jaron Lanier
You are not a Gadget - Lanier

Blockchain - cryptocurrency

The Long Tail - online marketing
Hooked
Contagious: Why Things Catch On

Dataclasym - how we act when no one is looking

Countdown to Zero Day - online warfare
Future Crimes
Future Crimes: Inside the Digital Underground and the Battle for Our Connected World
This Machine Kills Secrets - Leaking

Wikinomics - how collaboration changes everything
Code: Collaborative Ownership and the Digital Economy

From Gutenberg to Zuckerberg

No Logo

Pax Technica - Soon we will live in a pervasive yet invisible network of everyday objects that communicate with one another. In this original and provocative book
